positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical composition featuring celestial flora. Dominant elements include geometricized lunar phases, intertwined cosmic vines, and stylized flowers, rendered in a bold Mid-Century Modern Art Nouveau style. Clean, thick black linework contrasts sharply against a deep midnight indigo background. Accents of antique gold and muted sage green provide depth. Central composition, designed for apparel print, emphasizing strong silhouettes, clean negative space, and high visual impact. Retro-futurism, vector illustration, graphic design quality.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, low detail, realistic, photograph, messy lines
